summary: Iteration 109: Chef Gio Training Module & Kitchen War Room - Backend 16/16 tests PASSED (100%), Frontend fully verified. Chef Gio uses real Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1) for AI conversation. Kitchen War Room shows live operations with 6 KPI cards, bottleneck detection, equipment grid, firing timeline, cart labels, and supplier alerts.
critical_code_review_comments: Chef Gio Training uses real Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1) - NOT mocked
LLM responses take 5-15 seconds - appropriate timeouts implemented
Session persistence in MongoDB (gio_training_sessions, gio_training_messages collections)
Knowledge base supports custom entries (gio_knowledge collection)
Kitchen War Room correctly loads 4 endpoints in parallel (equipment, firing-sequence, cart-labels, supplier-shortage/detect)
Bottleneck detection working - shows 373.3% capacity warning with EchoStratus solutions
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing BEOs #7186 (Caribbean Evenings Dinner Buffet) and #7169 (BBQ Lunch) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 109 tested Chef Gio Training Module and Kitchen War Room. All endpoints working: POST /api/chef-gio/sessions/create (with/without BEO), POST /api/chef-gio/sessions/{id}/message, GET /api/chef-gio/sessions/{id}/history, GET /api/chef-gio/sessions, GET /api/chef-gio/training-modes (4 modes), GET /api/chef-gio/knowledge-base, POST /api/chef-gio/knowledge-base/add. Kitchen War Room uses: GET /api/kitchen-production/equipment, POST /api/kitchen-production/firing-sequence, POST /api/kitchen-production/cart-labels, POST /api/kitchen-production/supplier-shortage/detect. Both panels accessible from sidebar under CULINARY OPERATIONS.

GET /api/chef-gio/sessions - lists all training sessions - PASSED
POST /api/chef-gio/sessions/{id}/message - sends message and gets AI response - PASSED
GET /api/chef-gio/sessions/{id}/history - returns full conversation history - PASSED
POST /api/chef-gio/sessions/{id}/message with empty message - returns 400 - PASSED
Kitchen War Room full load (all 4 endpoints) - PASSED

4 quick mode buttons present (full_walkthrough, quiz, scenario, freeform) - PASSED
Session creation with BEO #7186 - AI opening message received - PASSED
Kitchen War Room panel loads with data-testid='kitchen-war-room' - PASSED
6 KPI cards displayed (Working Ovens, Oven Capacity, Utilization, Overflow, Shortages, Callouts) - PASSED

chef_gio_training.llm_integration: Real Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1) - NOT mocked
chef_gio_training.beo_integration: Loads BEO data and builds context for LLM

kitchen_war_room.bottleneck_detection: Shows 373.3% capacity warning with EchoStratus solutions
kitchen_war_room.equipment_grid: Rational ovens, Winston CVAP, Hot Boxes, CresCorr, Jade Range
kitchen_war_room.firing_timeline: Load proteins steps with T-30m, T-15m timing

mocked_apis.note: Chef Gio uses real Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1). Fallback response only if LLM fails.
